title: Create: Maximus
description:
Create modpack with plenty of create addons, made for people with an interest in destroying the environment. (and being industrial)

There are no quests in this modpack.
body:
# WARNING
**ANY WORLDS MADE WITH VERSIONS 1.04 OR BELOW WILL NOT WORK WITH NEWER VERSIONS!!!**
  
  Create: Maximus is an addon made with most of the create addons, also with mods like Farmer's Delight. This mod is made for people who want to make large factories and destroy the enviroment.

  This modpack is compatible with any create addon for create 6.6*

This modpack does not have quests, as I do not know how to add them.

# NOTICE

This is barely a modpack, it's more like a badly veiled mod collection.

# ATTENTION
If you are an author of any the mods included in this modpack and do not approve of your mod being in this modpack, please contact me! I will honour your request.


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------


*Except for dreams and desires
